name: @metorial/nextdns
description: Manage DNS filtering profiles with customizable security, privacy, and parental control rules. Configure threat protection (malware, cryptojacking, phishing), ad/tracker blocklists, and content filtering. Manage per-profile allow and deny lists, logging settings, and performance options. Access detailed DNS query analytics by domain, device, protocol, IP, and encryption status. Stream real-time DNS query logs via SSE and download or clear log history.
